nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Tawny-breasted honeyeater
nodes.summary: The tawny-breasted honeyeater (Xanthotis flaviventer) is a species of bird in the family Meliphagidae. It is found in Australia, Indonesia, and Papua New Guinea. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests, subtropical or tropical mangrove forests, and subtropical or tropical moist montane forests. References

nodes.name: 巴布亚新几内亚
nodes.summary: 巴布亚新几内亚是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联71种鸟类，包括白腹麻鸭、Black-eared cuckoo、Shining bronze cuckoo等71种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Xanthotis
nodes.summary: Xanthotis（Xanthotis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联3种鸟类，如Tawny-breasted honeyeater、Spotted honeyeater、Macleay's honeyeater。
